title: Velocify Optimized
description: Extreme boost to FPS with all the features of OptiFine for Minecraft 1.21
body:
⚡️ Velocify Optimized – Speed. Style. No Compromise.
Take Minecraft 1.21 to the next level with Velocify Optimized—a high-performance modpack engineered to maximize FPS while delivering all the advanced visual features you'd expect from OptiFine, and more.

Built with the power of Fabric and precision-picked mods, Velocify combines blazing-fast performance with stunning graphical enhancements:

🚀 Lightning-fast rendering thanks to Sodium & ModernFix

🌈 Shader-ready visuals with Iris integration

💡 Dynamic lighting, zoom customization, and connected textures

🔧 Clean gameplay even on low-end setups

🌍 Sharper visuals, smoother chunks, zero lag

Whether you're speedrunning, building, or just vibing in your world, Velocify turns Minecraft into an experience that's lighter, sharper, and faster.

🎮 Minimal lag. Maximum impact. 🔧 Optimized performance—crafted for you.
